rules.description: Catalog fee must be exactly Rs.500 less than enrollment fee
rules.on_failure: Update catalog fee to be exactly Rs.500 less than the enrollment fee

rules.description: Exam fee must be cleared before enrollment is valid
rules.on_failure: Update EXAM_USER: set fee_cleared = Y after student pays exam fee

rules.description: Enrollment fee must be greater than Rs.5000
rules.on_failure: Update ENROLL_USER: enrollment fee must be set above Rs.5000

rules.description: Student attendance must meet minimum 75% requirement
rules.on_failure: Update EXAM_USER: record correct attendance — must be at least 75%

rules.description: Enrollment fee must not exceed catalog fee by more than 10%
rules.on_failure: Update ENROLL_USER: reduce enrollment fee to within 10% of catalog fee
